prestazioni: Upgrade to a **Garrett GT2867R turbocharger** (846718-5003S) with a **custom 0.63 A/R turbine housing** to optimize spool for the **EA888 Gen3 (CUPRA CJXC 2.0 TSI)** engine, paired with a **Forge Motorsport recirculating diverter valve (FMFSV0004P)** to prevent boost leaks under aggressive shifts

Install a **Milltek Sport 304 stainless steel cat-back exhaust system (SS5S304)** with **76mm dual outlets** and **resonated center section** to enhance scavenging while maintaining daily drivability, combined with a **RaceChip GTS Black** piggyback ECU tuner (pre-loaded with Stage 2+ maps for **98 RON fuel**) to target **340 HP / 480 Nm** on stock internals

Replace the stock **EA888 Gen3 intercooler** with a **Wagner Tuning Competition intercooler (81410.090)** (core dimensions: 600x300x65mm) and **custom silicone charge pipes (VWR Racing CP001-01)** reinforced with **TurboSmart Kompact 50mm dual-port BOV (TS-0203-1072)** to eliminate heat soak and reduce intake temps by **25°C** under track conditions
estetica: **Rieger Tuning Cupra Leon MK3 widebody kit (RT-LEO3-WB)** with **custom carbon fiber front splitter (RT-LEO3-SPL-CF)** and **adjustable rear diffuser (RT-LEO3-DIF-CF)**, paired with **OZ Racing Ultraleggera HLT 19x9.5 ET45 wheels** (staggered setup: 245/35 R19 front, 265/30 R19 rear) in **Gloss Black with red lip**

**Seibon Carbon fiber hood (CUP-LEO3-HOOD-CF)** with **hidden venting channels** to reduce underhood temps, combined with **CUPRA Performance LED taillights (5E0052101A)** and **Morimoto XB LED headlights (88121-HB4)** for aggressive OEM+ lighting

**APR Carbon Fiber side skirts (CUP-LEO3-SSK-CF)** and **custom rear wing (APR GT-250 in carbon fiber)** with **adjustable angle mounts (0-12°)** for downforce tuning, finished with **3M Gloss Red (WR) vinyl wrap** on the roof and mirrors for contrast
